products.name: Stripe SaaS Billing Starter Kits for Node
products.summary: Comparison page for six live Stripe billing source kits.

products.name: License Launch Kit
products.summary: Node source kit for issuing, verifying, and tracking software license keys.

products.name: Stripe Team Seat Kit
products.summary: Node source kit for per-seat Stripe subscription syncing and seat-limit enforcement.

products.name: Stripe Usage Alerts Kit
products.summary: Node source kit for usage thresholds, notification events, and billing warnings.

products.name: Stripe MRR Analytics Kit
products.summary: Node source kit for monthly recurring revenue snapshots from Stripe subscription data.

products.name: Stripe Invoice Tax Kit
products.summary: Node source kit for invoice tax metadata and review workflows around Stripe invoices.

products.name: Metered API Launch Kit
products.summary: Node source kit for API key issuance, monthly quota checks, usage logs, and Stripe checkout hooks.

products.name: Stripe Cancel Save Kit
products.summary: Node source kit for cancellation reasons, save-offer handling, and Stripe subscription updates.
